name: RSA keygen + sign/verify
task: Create /tmp/eval_rsa/rsa.py with three functions: gen_rsa_keys(bits=512, seed=None) returns (n, e, d) where n is the product of two distinct primes of bits//2 each; e=65537 (or smallest odd coprime if not coprime with phi); d is the modular inverse of e mod phi. rsa_sign(message_int, n, d) returns pow(message_int, d, n). rsa_verify(signature, message_int, n, e) returns True iff pow(signature, e, n) == message_int. Use Miller-Rabin for primality.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_rsa/rsa.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); n, e, d = mod.gen_rsa_keys(bits=512, seed=42); assert n.bit_length() in (511, 512); msg = 0xDEADBEEF; sig = mod.rsa_sign(msg, n, d); assert mod.rsa_verify(sig, msg, n, e); assert not mod.rsa_verify(sig, msg + 1, n, e); print('OK')
